{{Quote|My ancestors have been warriors for thirty generations! We have a saying... 'born and buried in battle armor!' |Sharlee|<ref name="The Constancia Affair" />}}
'''Sharlee''' was a [[Constancian]] [[Gender/Legends|female]]. She came from thirty generations of a proud warrior family that specialized in the use of [[battle armor]]. Her skill with battle armor was so advanced that she was able to use the Augment-9 setting, or nine times faster than a [[Human/Legends|human]], which amazed [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. Along with [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], she defended the Constancian leader [[Gamine]] during her [[mission to Constancia]].
